titleStmt.title: SII 7.384: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer

No. 384. (A.R. No. 179 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE. This inscription had been copied again and on the fresh impression the situation is marked lying near the Rasabhāvi at Kōṭagēri.”

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
patayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
kya�garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svasti śrī . jayābhyuda
ya śakavaruṣa 1347 nē krōdhisaṁvatsarada phālguṇa ba 10 gu lu śrīmanma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappu
varāyaragaṁḍa catussamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahā
rāyaru vijayanāgariya rājadhāniyalu sakaḷasāṁbrājyavanu prati
pālisutta yiha kāladalū A dēvarāyara nirūpadiṁ bārakūrarā
jyavanu narasidēvavoḍeyaru pratipālisuva kāladalū kōṭeyakēriya mā
rkkaṁḍēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalū hiṁguḷādēviyara dēvasthānakke naḍava kaṭṭa
ḷeya dhar(ṁ)mmavanū halaru seṭṭikāṟeru māḍi barasida śilāsāṣanada kra
maveṁteṁdare paṁcaliṁgadēvara bhaṁḍāradiṁda mūḍe 1 kkaṁ nāgaṁḍugada
lekkada Amrutapaḍige Akki mūḍe 12 dīpakke 72 teṁgeṁṇeyū
prativaruṣaU naḍadubahudu . yī dēvasthānada catuḥsīmeya vivara mūḍalū
baḍaga maṭhadiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Agaḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lū rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rājabīdiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁ
tī catuḥssīmeyoḷaguḷa nela mane 10 kke nela Oṁdake 45 ha maṭhada Aṁgaḍi 1 ka ga 1 Ubha
yaṁ prativaruṣa 1 ke ga 6 hoṁniṁda madhyāṁnada Upāra naḍaUdu pūjāriya
kereyiṁda Aruvārada bageya ga 40 baḍḍiya 5 mūḍe Akki rātreyu
pārakke bahudu . baḷamantaOḍeyara tōṭadoḷagaṇa Ōleyakāṟara mane
kamaseṭṭiti varuṣakke ga 1 paṁcaliṁgadēvara toḷaśāmaṁṭapada kṣīrābdhi
ya bhūridānakke bahudu . yī dhar(ṁ)mma Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavaṁ
tāgi kōṭeyakēriya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru barasi naṭṭa śilāsāśana . I
dhar(ṁ)mada mēlāraike balleyaseṭṭiya maga dakkatana baḷiya māṇiseṭiya
radu yiṁtapudakke kōṭeyakēriya seṭṭikāṟaru teḷuvapparasaru saṁ
dagiriseṭiyaru sire seṭiyaru ratunaseṭiyaru yī nālvaru seṭikāṟara
vopa paṁcaliṁgadēvaru nālvaḍa māṇiseṭṭi kōceseṭṭiya vopa paṁceliṁ
gadēvaru halara vopa paṁcaliṁgadēvaru yī dhar(ṁ)makke Aḷupidavaru vā
raṇāsiyalli sāvirakavileya koṁda nāyakanarakakke hōharu
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānātsēyōnrupālanaṁ . dānātsvarggamavā
pnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
